detail: Started online specification retrieval from official RFC Editor and IETF Datatracker sources.
Searched official/primary sources for QUIC RFCs 8999, 9000, 9001, 9002, 9221, 9287, 9368, 9369 and IETF QUIC drafts for load balancing, ACK frequency, and reliable stream reset.
Classified core RFCs, extension RFCs, and active IETF drafts relevant to MsQuic transport behavior; excluded HTTP/3/QPACK as application-layer standards rather than direct MsQuic core requirements.
Validated online-spec/index.json with python3 -m json.tool and listed generated online spec files.
Official standards and draft source summaries were generated.
